app_release_notes: v1.2.16 - Measure screen: your result badges drag and place cleanly on the last target, the what's-next guidance rides in a banner that never covers your target, and placing badges is smooth. Start a new load now carries your setup forward (rifle, powder, brass, distance, and more). Reworded 'CSV' to 'files' throughout since Loadscope reads Excel exports too.

mac.app_release_notes: v1.2.16 - Measure screen: your result badges drag and place cleanly on the last target, the what's-next guidance rides in a banner that never covers your target, and placing badges is smooth. Start a new load now carries your setup forward (rifle, powder, brass, distance, and more). Reworded 'CSV' to 'files' throughout since Loadscope reads Excel exports too.

windows.app_release_notes: v1.2.15 - Create New Load now files your current load to Past Loads and starts a fresh one (the button previously re-showed your old screen). And after you plan your ladder it walks you to Measure Target to add your groups, then Import your chronograph, then Results -- the full guided flow, measure first.
